'''galuru''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oathlet|oathlet]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-l-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oathlet|oathlet]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| galuru
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gælirith|gælirith]] || [[word:gælirij|gælirij]] || [[word:gælirish|gælirish]] || [[word:gæliri|gæliri]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:galuluruth|galuluruth]] || [[word:galuluruj|galuluruj]] || [[word:galulurush|galulurush]] || [[word:galuluru|galuluru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:galuruth|galuruth]] || [[word:galuruj|galuruj]] || [[word:galurush|galurush]] || [[word:galuru|galuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:galufruth|galufruth]] || [[word:galufruj|galufruj]] || [[word:galufrush|galufrush]] || [[word:galufruf|galufruf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:galuruthu|galuruthu]] || [[word:galuruju|galuruju]] || [[word:galurushu|galurushu]] || [[word:galuruku|galuruku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:galuruth|galuruth]] || [[word:galuruj|galuruj]] || [[word:galurush|galurush]] || [[word:galuru|galuru]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:galuruthul|galuruthul]] || [[word:galurujul|galurujul]] || [[word:galurushul|galurushul]] || [[word:galurukul|galurukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:galuruthuthu|galuruthuthu]] || [[word:galurujuju|galurujuju]] || [[word:galurushushu|galurushushu]] || [[word:galuruku|galuruku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:galuruthun|galuruthun]] || [[word:galurujun|galurujun]] || [[word:galurushun|galurushun]] || [[word:galurukun|galurukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:galuruthuoro|galuruthuoro]] || [[word:galurujuoro|galurujuoro]] || [[word:galurushuoro|galurushuoro]] || [[word:galurukuoro|galurukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
